return(function(l,T,D,z,f,S,V,s,x,J,N,b,o,X,B,r,a,C,w,h,A,Z)B,b,x,J,C,s,a,N,r,w,X,A,o,Z,h={},{},function(l,Q)local T=w(Q)local D=function(D,z,f,S,V)return s(l,{D,z,f;S,V},Q,T)end return D end,function(l,Q)local T=w(Q)local D=function(D,z,f)return s(l,{D;z;f},Q,T)end return D end,function()A=A+(-988963-(-988964))b[A]=1035401+-1035400 return A end,function(s,D,z,f)local wy={}local
